# KANBAN_CARD_STATUS

**Database:** Operational

**Description:** Stores the various KANBAN_CARD_STATUSs generated by KANBAN_CARD_STATUS components.

## Columns

| Name | Data Type | Nullable | Default | Primary | FK To | Description |
|------|-----------|----------|---------|---------|-------|-------------|
| KanbanCardStatus | INT(10,0) | False |  | True |  | Unique identifier of a record (key) in a table. User-defined status ID. |
| Name | NVARCHAR(50) | False |  | False |  | Card Status Name or description.- empty - not processed by anyone- in progress - in process of fulfilment, - full - ready to be used, - on-hold - not to be used |
| TextID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False |  | Unique identifier of the Text. Can be used for translation purposes. |
